mapper.sql: id, user_id, title, content, memo_date, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM memo WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY memo_date DESC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO memo (user_id, title, content, memo_date, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{memoDate}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
